evidence: Scaffold verified: init.sh, feature_list.json, project_specs.xml, bootstrap.ts present.
API healthy at http://127.0.0.1:3099 (container PORT=5171, OSS runtime).
POST /v1/auth/register → 201. POST /v1/admin/incidents → 201. POST /api/v1/remediation → 201 remediationId=f94b2661-5d67-41dd-83f5-b8e28a9bbd74 with ecs.updateService + ecs.forceNewDeployment steps.
POST /api/v1/remediation/:id/approve with admin JWT → HTTP 200, status=approved, approvedBy=qa-ac023-1783704251@example.com.
Second POST /api/v1/remediation/:id/approve → HTTP 409 CONFLICT (status completed after auto-execute).
ApprovalEntity creation confirmed via code audit: ApproveRemediationUseCase calls approvalRepo.create() (approve-remediation.usecase.ts:39-59), wired with PgApprovalRepository in bootstrap.ts.
